findings.description: RST cross-reference markup `:ref:`thread_context_handler`` is preserved verbatim in the section text. This raw markup syntax will appear as an artifact to an AI reading the knowledge file, rather than being resolved to a readable handler name.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses RST syntax: `:ref:`thread_context_handler` より後ろに設定すること` — the knowledge file should render this as plain text, e.g., `thread_context_handler より後ろに設定すること`.
